news.t: Beacon Capital Management Launches Beacon Tactical Risk (BTR) ETF Based on its Flagship Portfolio

overview.description: The Beacon Selective Risk ETF (BSR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an active fund-of-funds, specifically from Vanguard, seeking capital appreciation by investing in US equities while attempting to minimize losses in volatile markets. The fund utilizes a potential risk mitigation strategy to exit specific sectors into fixed-income securities. BSR was launched on Apr 17, 2023 and is issued by Sammons Enterprises.

data.title: Beacon Capital Management Launches Beacon Tactical Risk (BTR) ETF Based on its Flagship Portfolio
data.text: DAYTON, Ohio, April 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Beacon Capital Management (www.BeaconInvesting.com), a registered investment adviser (RIA) firm that seeks to offer long-term investors innovative portfoli...
